entry.title: ODPI e ORDR

entry.title: Re: How to Create a Tile Pointing to dynamic URL : S/4Hana
entry.content:
Hello @Jocelyn_Dart 

We are trying to make the Fiori tiles accessible from S4 system but for BW queries.

Example: when clicking on the tile from S4 Launchpad it will open AFO but the BW query which is available in BW system..

For that we have created a RFC between S4 and BW system also a system Alias and maintained the same in the /UI2/V_ALIASMAP table.

Provided the system Alias name in Target Mapping but still when i click on the Fiori Tile from S4 launchpad, AFO gets open but says cannot find the query.

Could you please help how to achieve this (S4 launchpad Fiori tile for BW system query)

Thanks in advance,

Manasa B.

entry.title: KBA 3370268 (program variant save bug) is unclear
entry.content:
Just in case, posting here about a weird content in the note 3370268 - "Do not save values" in program screen variant attributes is not working. - SAP for Me (see my rating below).

Please help me, if you read my question in the future, and you are interested by this note, please add a comment if you see a new version of the note (currently Version: 2, Released On: 19.12.2023), so that I'm informed, and I'll have a look. I ask here, just because I don't know a way to be informed of any change in an SAP note (if you know, please tell me).

Thank you.

Rating "Was this KBA helpful?" > No > "This article is inaccurate" and "This article is confusing" and the below comment in "Tell us what we can do to improve this document":

The steps to reproduce concern the attribute "do not save values", they are not related in any way to "Variant variables / Dynamic Date functions get not saved for invisible".

entry.title: Re: Error Importing content in SAP Build Work Zone - SAP...
entry.content:
It seems to be related to the system (I was working in the Test system). I replicated the configuration in the Production system, and it worked correctly.




Thanks!!!

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Snowflake MFA sync with SAP BO
entry.content: How to set up an MFA mechanism using Microsoft Entra ID (Azure Active Directory) for Snowflake connectivity in SAP BI?

entry.title: Program variant has a value despite "save field without value" in ECC 6 EHP7
entry.content:
I'm a little surprised by a bug in my ECC system. I see a few old program variants of a custom program, with a parameter P_FILE_1 which has both one non-empty value and the checkbox "save field without value" checked.

If I save the program variant, the value is emptied, as I expect (back to the normal situation).

The program RSVARDOC_610 doesn't fix the issue (note that RSVARDOC_NEW doesn't exist in my system). RSVCHECK says that the program variant is fine.

For information, running the program with such a weird program variant (having both a non-empty value and the checkbox "save field without value" checked), behaves like if the checkbox was not checked, i.e. the parameter field in the selection screen is changed with the value from the program variant.

NB: only one selection screen.

Did you hear about this "bug"? I didn't find any SAP note about it.

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: Re: KBA 3370268 (program variant save bug) is unclear
entry.content: Hey @Sandra_Rossi i loooove a good rating but i didnt get if you wish (me) to try that note behavior OR only how to be notified for notes changes

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello @NWL,

The Delaware Paid Family and Medical Leave Tax Types will be delivered by the below notes.

Currently, the notes are still being finished by the developers, meaning you won't be able to access them by now.
However, I suggest you to keep an eye on those, as this should be released to customers soon.

3536013 (BSI: Employee and Employer Delaware Paid Family & Medical Leave - Tax Types 125 to 136).
3538215 (BSI: Employee and Employer Delaware Paid Family & Medical Leave - Tax Types 125 to 136 for Concurrent Employment).

Thank you,
Carlos

entry.title: Re: TaxFactory 11.0
entry.content:
Hello @rosette_vaughn2,

The Delaware Paid Family and Medical Leave Tax Types will be delivered by the below notes.

Currently, the notes are still being finished by the developers, meaning you won't be able to access them by now.
However, I suggest you to keep an eye on those, as this should be released to customers soon.

3536013 (BSI: Employee and Employer Delaware Paid Family & Medical Leave - Tax Types 125 to 136).
3538215 (BSI: Employee and Employer Delaware Paid Family & Medical Leave - Tax Types 125 to 136 for Concurrent Employment).

Thank you,
Carlos

entry.title: Changes In Word Documentation not reflecting in PDF Version
entry.content:
When generating documentation of a simulation, I made changes to the WORD doc by changing the title to "test", saved it then closed Word. I then generated the PDF file hoping that the changes made on the Word file would reflect when I generate in PDF.

I am certain it reflected the changes on another project, but I cannot seem to recreate this.

I followed the instructions to set up a WORD template under Documentation Style and link it under Documentation Settings.

Please could you help resolve this issue

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
@CarlosAccorsi 

Per BSI - TUB 152 was released on November 6 with the Delaware changes.  So are you saying that there are other changes that need to be released by SAP still?  I thought these kind of changes were managed together and released simultaneously so when we run the sync tool all the necessary tables are updated.  We are on a short time frame to get this change in based on when we run our first payroll of 2025 and were planning to install the latest TUB on 11/18.  Do you anticipate that the SAP changes will be released prior to that date?

Thank you,

Alicia

entry.title: Re: Getting a blank screen when clicking on Joule Icon
entry.content:
Refer to

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-btp-onboarding-series-joule-getting-started-with-joule-and-sap/ba-p/13575477

entry.title: ONB: Not able to see the Time management info for Onboardee/inactive Employee
entry.content:
Hi, 

we hired people through ONB, Manage pending hire, they are still inactive employee as their hire date are in the future. but we need to modify the time off data and Time sheet before their arrival.

we modify the As of date in the future (so on their hiring date or later), we go to the Time Management Block and we have  see this (see screen shot 1):

Time Sheet

You are not authorized to access time sheet data or the user does not exist.

Upcoming Time Off

You are not authorized to view time off data.

When we add employee through "add mew employee" and even if their hire date is in the future, we are able to display and modify their Time info. 

we checked the RBP and everything looks ok, so we are not able to fix the issue.

Any advice on this please?

Thanks, 

sevda

entry.title: Re: Class II_SDSLS_ESR_SALES_ORDER_BULK is not a proxy class
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: Class II_SDSLS_ESR_SALES_ORDER_BULK is not a proxy class
entry.content:
Hi Pritam,

You need to activate Deployment Scenario SAP_COM_0288 using transaction /AIF/CONTENT_EXTRACT to solve this isse.

Reference doc: https://help.sap.com/doc/4410b8cf32544b888aa64c65cb9a4b2b/2305/en-US/fe30d316460c4e43bfb94a8df9d1ad61.pdf

entry.title: Re: “SAP Profitability and Performance Management” - Impo...
entry.content:
Hi Nica,

Just to clarify, It is not possible to migrate from PaPM On Prem/Cloud SM to PaPM Cloud Universal Model.  

"Automatic migration of environment from SAP PaPM On-Premise or SAP PaPM Cloud SM to a SAP PaPM Cloud UM tenant is not possible."

Regards

entry.title: Re: Binding transfer problem
entry.content:
Without the full project I can't say for sure why.  However, I did a test with the following setup.

Data Table -> OnPress -> Navigation Action -> Modal Page

On the Modal page I have a button and a Key Value control to confirm the default binding for the page is the selected row from the data table.  In the OnPress of the button I call the first rule 

Button -> OnPress -> Rule 1 -> SetActionBinding -> Rule 2 -> Navigation -> Detail Page

I checked via the debugger that in both Rule 1 and Rule 2 the ClientAPI.binding was still set to the selected Row from the Data Table.  On the Detail Page there are default bindings to the data from the selected row and they are populated as expected confirming the binding was passed from the Data Table row to the detail page.

Since there is stuff in your Rule 2 I don't see I can't say if that impacts anything or not but it looks like you should be good to go assuming your detail page is trying to bind to the row properties from the Data Table.

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to show a chart in the MDK web platf...
entry.content: MDK Web client does not currently support any charting display.  I am afraid I don't have any alternatives for you at this time.

entry.title: Re: Introducing the Accounting Rules Engine (ARE) Powered by SAP PaPM Universal Model
entry.content:
Hi!

This content includes a way to retract information from PaPM UM to S/4HANA, similar to the finance ledger adapters in PaPM SM?

Is this possible in UM?

Regards

entry.title: Re: How do I created a deep entity in an MDK app
entry.content: Typically you would call CreateEntity for the PM Order and the call CreateRelatedEntity for the Operation to associate it to the PM Order.  You can optionally include both of these in a Change Set to guarantee they go together to the backend and use pending references to access the new key assuming the backing is assigning key values and if needed in the Operation Set depending on your Odata model.

entry.content:
@Sefan_Linders  Nice blog, thanks. We are looking for options to do Datasphere DAC using GL/Profit Center/Cost Center Hierarchy Directory Node and we want to use Hierarchy Directory Nodes in Calculated Columns of Datasphere modeling objects (to replace BEx query cell definitions with Hierarchy nodes) but Datasphere don't have standard functionality. Can you please suggest if you have any ideas on these both use cases.

entry.title: Re: Tables for BOM Header and Components
entry.content: You also need to add table STAS between STKO (header) and STPO(Items) otherwise, you will have issue for each alternative (STLAL).

entry.title: Re: Missing privileges to publish the changes on Budget v...
entry.content:
Hi #SahilTaneja Thanks for your inputs.

1. folder access - Do you mean the folder which contains DA? I given authorization to Individual Data Actions instead of folder.

2. make sure version is accessible for user - My Version is not enabled DAC, So I think all versions are accessible to all users.

3. Dimension update access - No new Dimensions are updating in my DA, hence I Provided read access for all dimensions in role. And my DA against all measures with existing dimension members for Company code.

4. you would need to provision access at # level for that dimension. - In my case I am working against Company Code, So there is data generation at # level for company code.

If you see my error message - "you are missing privileges to publish the changes on Budget version". I don't know what is the issue with Data saving in Version(Budget)

Regards, Vasu

entry.title: Re: Master Derived role concept
entry.content: Is there a way to assign a single role to a master role when the single (child) role is already existing?

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager Licensing: What You Need to Know about Mobile Services Entitlement
entry.content:
Hi Dinu, 

To your questions: Is it not possible to deploy Dynamic Forms in the same subaccount as the Mobile Services? Or is it that you want to highlight that these could be different?

I have corrected the diagram according to the documentation. At this moment both options are possible: 

1. Deploying Dynamic Forms in the same subaccount as Mobile Services is the default approach that allows technicians to complete the forms using SAP Service and Asset Manager. 

2. Deploying Dynamic Forms in a separate subaccount can also be done when you want to use the Dynamic Forms trial to test out the service. This is the only use case where you would set this up in a separate subaccount.

The use of the term "internal SAP Applications" for referring to "SAP Service & Asset manager" is a little confusing. These are SAP applications to that are generally available for customers. So why qualify these as internal? In the Mobile Services these are called SAP Applications. 

I will translate your feedback to the MS team.

Thanks,

Alba

Thank you for your help

entry.title: home screen
entry.content: Hi, a question, do you know what this screen is called, when I connect to the development space it appears and when I go to see the page screen, how could I create one in the testing space?

entry.title: Possible to enter Business Partner order address as vendor in purchasing document
entry.content:
We have different business partners for regular vendors and for contact persons that only serve as an ordering address (if it deviates from the regular vendor).

These business partners are linked via customer/vendor integration with different vendor account groups.

The account group that is assigned to the ordering address business partners is not configured to be entered as a vendor in a purchasing document.

Nevertheless, this is still possible (which we don't want).

How can we prevent Business Partner Address being entered as a Delivery Address in the PO?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Possible to enter Business Partner order address as v...
entry.content:
What you are seeing (with regards to how the Delivery - or Order - Address behaves in the PO) is correct - this address field is used for the actual delivery itself, but its also possible to enter any address here, (including the Vendors own address, if its a Business Partner - this function covers multiple directions / possibilities as to what is a Business Partner).

In the standard system, (and also in your scenario), the Delivery Address in the PO can be manually changed to any address entered by the user, once they have access to the ME21N / ME22N transactions.

Access to create, update, or view is done in ME21N, ME22N, and ME23N - Create PO, Change PO, and View PO respectively.

If a user has the option to update (via ME22N), they can change the Delivery Address *as it's not validated if changing the address in the above scenario*.

If you want to force a check / limit entries on POs Delivery Address, this can be set via custom coding User Exit BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST,

(However, the address would need to be set in the first instance when creating the PO in ME21N, and saving - Your ABAPers may be able to make Delivery Address mandatory at PO creation in ME21N to capture it.)

Do note however limiting access to this field will prevent you from shipping to your / the business partners address  - which can happen in real-world scenarios.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Customized fields at Case management of FSCM
entry.content:
Hey @Jigang_Zhang张吉刚 ,

Do you know , where else can we update this field label, apart from SCMG_T_CASE_ATTR??

This Credit Analyst field is actually a "Processor" field which gets picked up from SCMG_T_CASE_ATTR & also named as "Processor" as well but in DCD it displays as "Credit Analyst"

Thanks & Regards

Shouvick

entry.title: Re: Customized fields at Case management of FSCM

Did you mange to raise an OSS on the DCD document status issue mentioned by you in the comment dated 2023 Jun 01 7:53 AM??

If you can share any information, that would be great.

Cheers

Shouvick

entry.title: SAP Asset Performance Management (APM) – Embedded IoT Now Generally Available
entry.content:
SAP Asset Performance Management (APM) has officially launched Embedded IoT, built on the market-leading Cumulocity platform. This marks a major milestone in how SAP supports asset health monitoring with cutting-edge IoT and AI innovations.

For some context, you may have seen this note on SAP for Me or read my previous blog.  Now, as Embedded IoT becomes generally available, it’s a good time to briefly recap why this innovation can help you get more value from the solution.

Why Embedded IoT is a Game-Changer for APM

Embedded IoT is foundational for to provide AI-assisted asset health monitoring and how we build future innovations.  With this new offering, APM offers enhanced capabilities that will transform how you manage and monitor assets.

1) Simplify connectivity scenarios. 

A new capability is available now to enable file uploads as an efficient channel to bring IoT sensor data into APM.  Please check out this documentation on the Help Portal that details the steps to set up a process to upload a compressed IoT timeseries data file.

2) Seamlessly manage IoT devices. 

Our first priority was to ensure APM can be easily integrated with existing data sources such as data historians, data lakes or any middleware/data consolidation layers using the file interface described above and REST API.  And now SAP will shift its focus to bring IoT device integration and management capabilities based on Cumulocity to you in 2025.

3) Continuously monitor asset health in a closed loop. 

APM is seamlessly integrated with S/4HANA through a unified data model, enabling an end-to-end asset management process—from defining maintenance strategies to executing them in a closed feedback loop. With Embedded IoT, we will continue to innovate by refining the use of AI and rules to monitor assets in condition-based and predictive maintenance strategies. We've already begun simplifying and enhancing the rule management experience—check out the latest updates on the new “monitoring” and “derivation” rules in the documentation.

As Embedded IoT is now generally available, all new customers will be provisioned with this technology.  Existing customers can visit the  SAP Help Portal to find updated documentation marked “Embedded IoT”. Please reach out to your account manager to start the process of moving your existing APM tenants to Embedded IoT.  Please also stay tuned for more technical insights on SAP Community from our product management colleagues in the coming days.

entry.title: Enterprise Architecture for integration?
entry.content:
What is the role of an Enterprise Architect in integration?

Integration is place where many project suffer – where many projects fail…

One could say, it’s not EA who should operationally lead the project – but I would say, this is not entirely true… EA is building the guardrails under which projects are being delivered, but E A is supporting key Enterprise initiatives.

So, where is EA in the integration?

If we take a look on TOGAF©, we have EAs in the Business Domain, we have them the Application, Data and Technology domain as well… Where does integration fit in?

It’s an enabler of Business Domain, but not Business Domain, and for sure it’s just Technology Domain... So, it gotta be between Application and Data Domain?

Integration Architecture?

No matter where TOGAF© places integration – it’s up to us to find its place in our Enterprise…

And this place is where? Well, we are witnessing the immense growing complexity of the IT Architecture as a whole – interlacing products & services, we see how much effort (and investment) it really, really takes to run new complex Digital Transformation initiatives (Agile EA - from SOA to Interoperability) – we see a clear need for building the Composable Business (Integration patterns for the Composable Business Architecture)…

Figure 1. Evolution of the integration complexity

The role must be very important… But is it observed like this?

Integration Architecture must be more than Solution Architecture in one product line or in one technology. But is it on the level of Enterprise Architecture?

General perception is – EA is associated with ABBs (Architecture Building Blocks), capabilities and functionalities; while SA is associated with SBBs (Solution Building Blocks), products and components… That leads us to the key question – can we “raise” integrations on the level of ABBs? Or is it only SBBs are talking about?

My thinking…

I’ll go in the reverse order…

If we talk about SBBs –we are in fact talking about products and components which will be used to implement and fulfil business requirements (as per TOGAF© Building Blocks). Also, SBBs are usually Vendor aware.

In practical terms, we may talk about solutions based on specific products, like: SAP Integration Suite, or SAP Event Mesh, or MuleSoft AnyConnect, or Apache Kafka, or Solace, or Microsoft Azure Service Bus etc.

And if we go on the level of components, we can talk about iFlows with or without Datastore or JMS Queues etc.

Now, if we go one level higher in the abstraction, like: Integration flows, API Management, Event Broker, Streaming, Topics & Queues etc. – aren’t we already on the level of capabilities and functionalities which are by definition ABBs? If we talk about specific requirements, like: Idempotent, Serialization, Guaranteed delivery, Publish-Subscribe pattern, Distribution pattern etc.– aren’t we also talking about specific business and/or technical requirements of ABBs (again, as per TOGAF© Building Blocks)?

Summary…

Integration Architecture, as “Domain” (even though it is not observed as such), should be elevated.

In the complex environments, it is not sufficient to observe it only on the perspective of products and components – it should be observed on the level of capabilities, not as a pure technology enabler...

  • Different products may be used to build API Management – but in essence no matter which product we use, we actually want API Gateway, API Portal, Developer Hub etc.
  • Or, different products could be used to build our EDA (Event-Driven Architecture) approach, but at the end we would always be looking for Publisher-Subscriber pattern, or Async Request-Response patter etc. capabilities.

Composable Integration Architecture?

… Which somehow leads me – why not having Composable Integration Architecture as well? We talk a lot about Composable Business Architecture (What is Composable Architecture?). But if we are building our integration around capabilities, meeting specific requirements, and observing some (preferably) open standards – why not… Why wouldn’t even those integration ABBs or SBBs be our LEGO© blocks we can play around – when we need, or if we need…

Final thoughts

… It is absolutely correct (or even necessary) to have separate EA and SA “layers” of the Integration Architecture, especially when working in the complex environments.

I might be bias, but this is somehow my impression…

Acknowledgment

*) Intro photo by Shubham Dhage on Unsplash

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for Monitoring DB
entry.content: hey @SAPSupport were you suppose to post the answers of those questions before marking as best solution?

entry.title: Re: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q4 2024
entry.content:
Hi Orla_C,

Thanks for the information in this blog, it is very helpful.

While migrating classic stories to the optimized experience we are having challenge with Table presentation with “Linked Dimensions”

  • When do you think “Link Dimensions”(precenting dimensions/measures from different data models in same table) will be supported in table presentations in SAC

entry.title: Re: Problems using SAP DI API in C#/.NET Core
entry.content:
I know this is an old query, however, I had the same error and realized it happened when I instantiated the variable that is to contain Company without an initialization value.

 

public static SAPbobsCOM.Company? oCom;

 

this generated the error that you indicate, and it was solved with this variable initialization.

 

public static SAPbobsCOM.Company? oCom = null;

 

is the only thing that was needed in my case.

Regards

Santiago M.

P.S.: this was translated, my native language is Spanish.

entry.title: Re: CURTO1009 You are not authorized for class type 400
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: CURTO1009 You are not authorized for class type 400
entry.content: Hi, I am also facing the same error. Checking with the security team, it looks like some authorization is missing.

entry.title: Ajuste mensual de ISR Mexico
entry.content:
Saludos,

Tengo el caso siguiente donde se ejecuta en la ultima nomina del mes (quincenal o semanal) con ajuste de ISR a fin de mes.  En este proceso la base gravada del mes no esta incluyendo el monto gravado de nominas especiales ejecutadas.

Hay alguna configuracion que permita sumar este gravado extraordinario o se debe hacer uso de algun exit.

Gracias

Liseth Linarez

entry.title: Re: Facing error when creating MTO Production Order
entry.content:
Thanks for a kind advice and sharing the SAP Notes Enda.

I'm able to solve this issue by setting the configuration based on SAP Notes.

entry.title: Re: Automatically Reassign Users to Another Class/Item in...
entry.content: @HarishTupakula, it'd be possible to try out an assignment profile with the "Item Completion > Does Not Match" rule.

entry.title: Re: Visibility of custom fields for end users
entry.content: @lilymar, as I understand the question, this option isn't currently available. There were some enhancement requests related to it, which were closed due to lack of votes (sample). Still, it's possible to open a new one, so it can be voted by who'd like to have it (KBA 2090228).

entry.title: Re: Visibility of all the status of the approvals?
entry.content: @lilymar, this option isn't currently available, if I understood it correctly. Some time ago, there was an enhancement request for it, which was closed due to lack of votes (sample). It's possible to create a new to be voted and reviewed by the Learning Product Management team (KBA 2090228).

entry.title: Re: Compliance Calculation Method In Preventive Maintenance
entry.content:
Hi,

Has it been identified when the ability to use 'Compliance Check by Offset' for strategy-based maintenance plans will be made available? This is a great feature from SAP but very limited if only available for single cycle maintenance plans. I've searched the road map explorer and unable to locate any upcoming items addressing this opportunity.

 

Compliance Check by Offset:

Note: Compliance check by offset is available only for single cycle plans with the category as Maintenance Order. The possibility to define the offset-based calculation for strategy-based maintenance plans will be available in future releases.

Thanks,

Chris Thomas

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to convert csv files to data-binary format in SAP CPI?
entry.content: Hi, do you have the updated link for this?

entry.title: How to search in one specific core/replica - Solr in SAP Commerce
entry.content:
Sometimes when working with Solr the standard query function to search in collections not fulfill all the needs, specially when troubleshooting sync issues between replicas of the same collection. So here is a trick for you:

  1. The Solr url for overview collections in Solr dashboard will be similar to https://myCoolEndpoint/#/master_myCollection_Product_default/collection-overview
  2. The Solr url for query collections in Solr dashboard will be similar to https://myCoolEndpoint/#/master_myCollection_Product_default/query

And the replica overview url is:

  • https://myCoolEndpoint/#/master_myCollection_Product_default_shard1_replica_n1/core-overview

It is pretty similar to the collection overview url right? So what happens if we change the /core-overview to /query ? 

Exactly if we access https://myCoolEndpoint/#/master_myCollection_Product_default_shard1_replica_n1/query, We will be able to run queries in that replica, shard1_replica_n1, of the master_myCollection_Product_default and verify if all replicas have the same result.

I Hope this trick help anyone looking for  how to search in one specific core/replica!

entry.title: Re: eInvoice with SAP DRC Electronic document processing using extensibility features
entry.content:
I've encounter below error message & Rejected by Tax Authority for SAP DRC MY e-invoicing for source document billing. Please help if any of you encounter below issue & how to solve it?

Tax type must be 2 (special case 3) characters long.

Message no. EDOCUMENT000

entry.title: UPDATE Handling Unit using API_HANDLINGUNIT does not work.
entry.content:
I'm trying to call the public API to update a Handling Unit in an S/4 2023 on-prem system.  The GET operation works, however, the PATCH operation throws this error.  Has anyone seen this error before?

{
    "error": {
        "code": "HU_RAP/066",
        "message": "Operation UPDATE not supported for LO-HU",
        "@SAP__common.ExceptionCategory": "Provider_Application_Error",
        "innererror": {
            "ErrorDetails": {
                "@SAP__common.Application": {
                    "ComponentId": "LO-HU-API",
                    "ServiceRepository": "SRVD_A2X",
                    "ServiceId": "API_HANDLINGUNIT",
                    "ServiceVersion": "0001"
                },
                "@SAP__common.TransactionId": "8452C63109A70020E0066FDA3E13200B",
                "@SAP__common.Timestamp": "20241114013306.193137",
                "@SAP__common.ErrorResolution": {
                    "Analysis": "Use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details",
                    "Note": "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
 
Here are some more details about how I'm making the call in PostMan:
URL:  
https://ERPS42023.ERP-IS.COM:4430/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_handlingunit/srvd_a2x/sap/handlingunit/0001/HandlingUnit(HandlingUnitExternalID='1000000569',Warehouse='')
 
Headers:
x-csrf-token  =  8g_-04avJscfSv8vIpDaWg==
if-match        =  W/"SADL-020241029183518C~20241029183518"
 
Body:
{
    "HandlingUnitWidth": 5,
    "UnitOfMeasureDimension": "CM"
}
 
 
 

Thank you,

entry.title: 2H 2024: AI-Driven Innovations to Streamline Productivity in SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding
entry.content:
With the 2H 2024 release, we have delivered new AI-driven capabilities within SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding to streamline onboarding processes and improve experiences across the hiring journey.

Through customer influence on the Customer Community and innovative product enhancements, we are bringing your ideas to life and driving improvements across the recruiting experience.

To learn more watch the on-demand Q&A webinar: 2H 2024 Product Release Webinars.

All of the 2H 2024 release items can be found on the What’s New Viewer. These new features will be live in Production on November 17th, 2024.

Now, a preview of the top highlights in SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding to get excited about in 2H 2024:  

AI-Assisted Onboarding with Joule

With this release, we have introduced new capabilities to deliver AI-enabled experiences to the onboarding process. Users can now use SAP’s AI copilot, Joule, to accelerate task completion and efficiently manage tasks, shortening time to onboard and improving productivity. Joule allows hiring managers and HR colleagues to view and initiate pending tasks, such as data review, forms, and e-signatures.

Joule also offers a conversational way for new hires to complete activities and receive recommendations and guidance during the onboarding process, helping promote productivity and efficiency.  

AI-Assisted Writing

Hiring managers and HR teams can now leverage AI-assisted writing for creating compelling welcome and farewell messages, enhances overall communication tone and clarity for new hires and departing employees.

Custom Tasks Extensions

With this release, extensibility and flexibility of the onboarding process is enhanced with extension points and an additional custom task block. Extension points help customers facilitate the completion of tasks or activities beyond the onboarding solution. The additional custom task block enables customers to initiate subsequent tasks and document flows to help meet unique onboarding requirements.

New Hire Onboarding Tour

A New Hire Onboarding guided tour, enabled by SAP Companion is now available from the Open Help icon in the Onboarding Checklist. The guided tour assists first time or unfamiliar users with navigating through their onboarding tasks, helping improve completion rates and reduce time to hire.

With every release, we are excited to deliver these new innovations and continue our journey of providing even greater value to our SAP SuccessFactors customers. For full details, please check out the 2H 2024 Release Highlights Resources: 

  • 2H 2024 Release Highlights Brochure 
  • 2H 2024 Release Highlights Video 
  • Product Release & Road Map Information 

Learn more about SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding.

 

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding

entry.title: Re: Hi All!
entry.content: yayyy fellow Canadian!

entry.title: Adjucent similar values merging/grouping in SAP Vizframe column chart
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Here I am facing an issue where Vizframes column chart is grouping the adjucent similar values at center on x-axis, only single data label is showing as attached below screen for temparature values where I want to remove merging and use that value for each coloumn without merging/grouping.

<viz.feeds:FeedItem id='categoryAxisFeed2' uid="categoryAxis" type="Dimension" values="Temperature"/>

Here is my XML:

<viz:VizFrame height="25rem" width="100%" class="graphborder" 
     id="idVizFrame" uiConfig="{applicationSet:'fiori'}"
     vizType='column' vizProperties="{title: {text: 'Usage Trend'}}" destroyLegendGroup="true">
    <viz:dataset>
        <viz.data:FlattenedDataset data="{JsonModel>/graphDtls}">
            <viz.data:dimensions>
                <viz.data:DimensionDefinition name="Meter Read Type" value="{JsonModel>Istablart}" />
                <viz.data:DimensionDefinition name="Period" value="{JsonModel>Period}"/>
                <viz.data:DimensionDefinition name="Temperature" value="{JsonModel>Temperature}" />
            </viz.data:dimensions>
            <viz.data:measures>
                <viz.data:MeasureDefinition name="KWh/Therms" value="{JsonModel>Consumption}"/>
            </viz.data:measures>
        </viz.data:FlattenedDataset>
    </viz:dataset>
    <viz:feeds>
        <viz.feeds:FeedItem id='valueAxisFeed' uid="valueAxis" type="Measure" values="KWh/Therms"/>
        <viz.feeds:FeedItem id='categoryAxisFeed2' uid="categoryAxis" type="Dimension" values="Temperature"/>
        <viz.feeds:FeedItem id='categoryAxisFeed' uid="categoryAxis" type="Dimension" values="Period"/>
        <viz.feeds:FeedItem id='categoryAxisFeed3' uid="categoryAxis" type="Dimension" values="Meter Read Type"/>
    </viz:feeds>
    <viz:dependents>
        <viz:Popover id="idPopOver"></viz:Popover>
    </viz:dependents>
</viz:VizFrame>

Attached screen red highlighted:

entry.title: SAP DM - How to create routing(or operation activity) which doesn't depend on Order
entry.content:
Hi experts,

When I integrate production order from S/4 HANA to DM,

operation activities are created with order no. (operation activity sample below : order no is 1001597)

That means, even if I use same material, each order has different operation activities.

Could anyone tell me how to fix that.

Best,

KoichiOkamoto

entry.title: Re: Steps for Sending Attachment through Service Layer API
entry.content: Hi Sachin, I’m not familiar with the SFA tool or how you've integrated the Service Layer API within it. However, once you post the SQ via the API, you will need to upload the generated attachment to the SAP Business One attachment folder. This can be done using SFTP/FTP upload through a script or via a RESTful API. After the file is successfully transferred, you can then use the Attachments2 API to upload the file path and details.

entry.title: Re: 7 quick tips on Continuous Feedback functionality
entry.content: A request was submitted and you want to retrieve it, meaning the feedback has not yet been provided.

entry.title: Re: Steps for Sending Attachment through Service Layer API
entry.content: Manish, So that means the attachment attached in the tool has to be sent through a different mode as you mentioned. So the /Attachment2 is only to create a Attachment entry for the attached file? is there any SAP B1 API only to send the attachment in encrypted manner

entry.title: DVM New analysis Expert mode cannot be scheduled weekly
entry.content:
Hello, 

We are using Solution manager 7.2 SP11 :

Today, we cannot automate the analysis of the data within the system landscape using Oracle system on Reorganization and Compression Potential and unused data from Solution Manager.
Since the size of the system are big, the job takes more than 7 days to analyze all the data from the system (per example <SID> or <SID>, see attached files)

We have used the manual analysis top 30 tables on theses system by using the features New analysis expert mode in the application Reorganisation and Compression Analysis (including HANA Sizing) in DVM. But we cannot schedule weekly analysis to get updated data as DataOverview for S/4 HANA System.

Could you please guide us to enable this functionality ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: DVM New analysis Expert mode cannot be scheduled weekly
entry.content:
Dear *,

 

The root cause of the analysis job running for a long time is that the Scope selected for analysis is very large, as we can see that many objects are being analyzed from the job log.

You can carry out the analysis again and select only the tables that are relevant to you. (For example, the x-largest tables in the system)

 

Execute the following steps to reduce the scope of the analysis:

  1. Execute TCODE SM_WORKCENTER
  2. Navigate to Data Volume Management
  3. Select the tile "Reorganization and Compression - Incl HANA Sizing"
  4. A new window will open, At the top of this page select the tab "Analysis List"
  5. Select button "New Analysis Expert Mode"
  6. This will open a new window with the guided procedure to create a new analysis.
  7. In "Step 2 - Objects Selection" of the guided procedure there is the option to select "Top X Tables"

The analysis job kicked off from this guided procedure will be completed more quickly, as the selected worklist objects will be significantly smaller than those in the current job which is taking a long time to run.

 

As we can see Step 4 Run Analysis in "New Analysis Expert Mode" , Only these two options "Start Immediate" and "Schedule at" are available without "Schedule weekly". You also can refer to the DVM guide to learn more about Reorganization and Compression from pages 50-52.

 

Best regards,

Leo

SAP Support

entry.title: Need Basis Expert how to enable configure button on AL11 tcode
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

i need to know how to enable AL11 configure button to add in directory for the new application development. Currently it show Display button only.. i have add in the authorization on S_RZL_ADM object and S_DATASET object, but it is still doesn't appear. can anyone teach me or brief to me.. urgent need. thanks a lot. By the way I am using SAP 4.0B

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now und IAS
entry.content:
Hi there,

You can pass User Roles into Enable Now through SSO, along with user details, by using the Groups attribute.  This KBA describes the scenario that you are asking about.  If you cannot get this working, raise an SAP Support Ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-MGR and ask for support configuring SSO.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Changes In Word Documentation not reflecting in PDF V...
entry.content:
Hi Sanchia,

That's now how documentation works with Enable Now.  You must modify the documentation settings and template used to generate the documentation, not the generated version of a Word document.  If you want to generate custom Word or PDF documentation, including modifying the branding and sections of documentation such as Headers and Footers, you should watch this video.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone - Part 1
entry.content:
Great post @matthias_schmalz . Love this series from you and it really helps tie all these ideas together.

Let's hope that the fiori tooling will take this up and the generators start using this technique as well instead of the complex (and very easy to stuff up) config for destinations that we currently/previously need to use the managed approuter.  😉 

Would be great to hear your thoughts on using the standalone approuter in this scenario as well?

Also, given we create a new content provider in work zone for this app - what if you have 50 apps - does that mean you have 50 additional content providers? And when they are updated do they refresh the cache tokens automatically? With the current HTML5 content provider there is no auto-refresh but I do see it on the roadmap.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA On-Premise API Return 401 Unauthorized Er...
entry.content:
Dear Alberto,

Facing similar issue from APIM . 

Please provide steps to fix

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Architecture for integration?
entry.content:
Hi @stevang ,
Great article and well written! Amazing to see how you mapped the TOGAF concepts with the Integration capabilities.

I have one query. Please help me understand this:

The way I see the hierarchy is,
BTP -> Integration Suite service -> iFlow/integration flow
BTP -> EventMesh service -> Queues/Topics
BTP -> Integration Suite service -> APIM -> Application -> Product....

You mentioned in your article,
"Now, if we go one level higher in the abstraction, like: Integration flows, API Management, Event Broker, Streaming, Topics & Queues etc. ".
Please clarify why you mentioned it as, "we are going a level higher" instead of "going a level deeper" because we are already in the third level when talking of iFlows and APIM (as APIM is now available inside the Integration Suite).

entry.title: 物料凭证过账，如何自动勾选 打印输出控制
entry.content: 你好，我想在MIGO时，自动勾选 打印输出控制选项，达到物料凭证保存时自动打印功能。而不是每次在操作时，需要手动 勾选 打印输出控制选项。我应该如何操作，谢谢。

entry.title: Re: Change CSS based on status value using Formatter Func...
entry.content:
<Text id="lbldate1” text="Enrolled Date" >
 <customData>
                                <core:CustomData key="anynameyoulike" value="{DOCKED_AT_DOOR}" writeToDom="true" />
                                </customData>
</Text>

your css

[data-anynameyoulike='Y']{
    color: #FFFF00;
}

you can figure out the rest
you may need to adjust the css a bit.

thanks

entry.title: Datasphereで標準CDS Viewがインポートできない事象
entry.content:
閲覧いただきありがとうございます。

現在Datasphereの階層機能調査の一環として、下記のブログの手順を実機で再現しようとしているのですが、ブログの中にある”I_GLACCOUNT”から始まるG/L勘定情報関連のCDS ViewがDatasphereのリモートテーブルインポート画面に表示されないという事象が発生しています。(図１)

SAP Datasphere：ディレクトリ階層の御紹介 - SAP Community 

 (図１)

下記のブログを参考に、対象のCDS Viewに必要な設定を調査し、下記２つの条件を満たしていることは確認済みです。
データ抽出可能なCDSビューの活用方法 - SAP Community 
・アノテーション「@Analytics.dataExtraction.enabled」が”true”に設定されている
・I_DATAEXTRACTIONENABLEDVIEWの「ISSAPRELEASEDVIEW」がXになっている (⇒リリース済のデータ抽出可能なCDSビューである)

ただ、上記を調べていて１点不思議だったのが、(図１) の画像に表示されている"I_GR"から始まるCDS Viewは「ISSAPRELEASEDVIEW」がXになっていないのに、Datasphere上に表示されている状態でした。 (アノテーション「@Analytics.dataExtraction.enabled」は”true”に設定されていました)

何か見落としている設定があるのかと疑っているのですが、こちらの事象の解決法をご存じの方がいらっしゃいましたら、お力をお借りしたいと思います。

よろしくお願いします。

entry.title: SAP Open Source Webinar – OpenSearch Foundation
entry.content:
From preserving an open-source project through a fork that initiated OpenSearch to establishing a new foundation, announced in September at the Open-Source Summit of Linux Foundation.

Join us on December 5th at 5:00 pm CET/ 8:00 am PST/ 11:00 am EST for a webinar about the OpenSearch Foundation with Anandhi Bumstead (Director, Software Development, OpenSearch at AWS) and Wolfgang Theilmann (Development Manager BTP at SAP). Both are involved in development activities with this mayor project and take responsibility in the newly founded OpenSearch Foundation. Anandhi and Wolfgang’s team are members of the Governing Board and Technical Steering Committee for the OpenSearch Project.

Learn and discuss, why this project has been transferred into the new OpenSearch Foundation, how license changes impact large open-source projects such as Elasticsearch and how AWS and SAP now collaborate in the new set-up of the OpenSearch Foundation.

Speakers: Anandhi Bumstead, Director of Engineering at AWS; Dr. Wolfgang Theilmann, Development Manager BTP at SAP

Host: SAP Open-Source Program Office

entry.title: Re: [Error] BDC clearing partial vendor field not input
entry.content:
I solved, I have create new record BDC F-44 with clearing partial vendor with number FI document, this is change solution. It will restrict issue and I can run it with display mode = 'N'. Will current issue, I am interested in exploring BDCs and call transactions further to gain a more comprehensive understanding.


Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Upgrade : SAPKB70208
entry.content:
Hi Badrane,

1. You must upgrade the ERP system with all components, not just a single Basis Component. You can't upgrade the Basis component from SAPKB70207 to SAPKB73101 both are different SAP versions.

2. Read the SAP upgrade guide based on your target release and the latest support packs. refer to the link based on your OS/DB and SAP source system version details.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER/9e41ead9f54e44c1ae1a1094b0f80712/576f5c1808de4d1abecbd6e503c9ba42.html

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: How to Remove a measure from a chart in sac script
entry.content: Hi @N1kh1l

entry.title: Re: How to Remove a measure from a chart in sac script
entry.content: Hi @N1kh1l, Thank you so much legend.

entry.title: Autosave of Outbound Delivery Printout
entry.content:
Client Requirement - A functionality to autosave the Delivery Printout in the system folder once the Outbound Delivery is created and PGI is done.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Autosave of Outbound Delivery Printout
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

You can define when and how to issue an output in the Output Parameter Determination app. With this app, you set output rules for the object type Outbound Delivery. The "Output relevance" defines the conditions that must be met for the output to be issued.

Kindly refer to the help link: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/aff0b3f5f46c42a2b2c0fabfc233bab2/da97600aec5247d1b7086b9165dd286b.html?locale=en-US

Best Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Question: Data retraction from SAC to ERP / ECC
entry.content: Hello Experts, I have the same question - what are the possible options to post the journal entry records in ECC  from the SAC-P application. These records need to be posted to ACDOCA table as regular GL Postings. We plan to generate the document number in SAC-P and make it ready for posting to ECC. Would appreciate if anyone can share their thoughts or their experience building such capability.

entry.title: Re: ALV Filter Column width is fixed '10' char only
entry.content:
Hi,

you have set outputlen as more character like 20 or more, here is the sample.

DEFINE fieldCat. "Macro

wa_fieldcat-fieldname = &1.
wa_fieldcat-seltext_s = &2.
wa_fieldcat-seltext_m = &3.
IF &1 EQ 'MATNR'.
wa_fieldcat-outputlen = '20'.
ENDIF.
APPEND wa_fieldcat TO it_fieldcat.
CLEAR wa_fieldcat.

END-OF-DEFINITION.

FORM designFieldCat.
fieldcat 'MATNR' 'Material' 'Material No.'.
ENDFORM.

entry.title: Re: Steps for Sending Attachment through Service Layer API
entry.content: Hi Sachin, Yes, the Attachments2 API will only create the entry in SAP. Currently, there doesn’t seem to be an API in the HANA Service Layer for uploading files directly to the SAP Business One attachment folder. You'll need to develop a separate script to handle the file upload to the attachment folder, and then pass the file path to the Attachments2 API.

entry.title: Route map limitation in PMGM
entry.content:
Customer Expectation- Customer expects that each goal approver or rater should be at job grade 14 or above, or at a higher grade than the employee's. For example, if an employee is at job grade 11, their manager is at grade 12, and the manager’s manager is at grade 14, then the manager’s manager should be the approver and rater for that employee. For example, if an employee is at job grade 13, their manager is at grade 14 then the manager should be the approver and rater for that employee. The system should automatically identify the appropriate person based on job grade and route the form directly to them, bypassing other steps.

Proposed Solution- The PMGM route map supports standard roles such as employee, manager, manager’s manager, EM+, matrix manager, HRBP, and user. The PM route map does not assign roles based on job grades; instead, roles are assigned from employee mappings, regardless of job grade. For goal approvals and ratings, however, the approver should have a Job Grade of 14 or higher, ensuring their grade is above the employee's. We can assign this approver through the job relationship by designating them as the “Matrix Manager.” This setup directs the form only to the appropriate person for approvals, streamlining the workflow and eliminating unnecessary steps.

Please suggest the best possible solution for this issue.

entry.title: Re: error: 80040154 received after Addon installation
entry.content: Hi Krishna, Is your SAP Business One installation 64-bit or 32-bit? Also, what about your add-on, is it 64-bit or 32-bit?

entry.title: Re: How to remove the SAP login in branded MDK app ?
entry.content: @Jitendra_Kansal we wan to remove sap universal login from mdk client app because we already hav user login screen in our application. And our end user don't have any universal ID to login.
